GenAiPlugin.description: Handles customer identity verification via OTP. This topic is triggered when a customer initiates a session or requests access to their account details. It generates a 6-digit OTP to the customer's registered mobile number and verifies the entered OTP before allowing access to any account information or banking services.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: When a customer starts a conversation, immediately trigger OTP generation to their registered email Id
Inform the customer that a 6-digit OTP has been sent to their registered mobile number.
Wait for the customer to enter the 6-digit OTP.
When OTP is received, verify it is exactly 6 digits and numeric before invoking Verify OTP action.
When OTP is generated successfully and output value is not null, automatically invoke the Verify OTP action.
If OTP is verified successfully, greet the customer and proceed to account selection.
If OTP verification fails, inform the customer politely and ask them to try again.
NEVER proceed to any account information without successful OTP verification.
NEVER ask for any other personal details like password, PIN, or card number during this process.

GenAiPlugin.scope: This topic covers OTP generation and verification only. It is triggered at the start of every session before accessing any account information. It does not handle balance enquiries, transactions, disputes, or EMI queries.
